rows.label: qev050404_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Guh... So strong...
Why is a warrior of your caliber
running errands for my son...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0002
rows.name:
Alright! Father, with this, I am finally free!
I'm throwing away this house, throwing away the Lars,
and starting a new life in NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Have you no Larsian pride?!
Guh...!
Damn it! My Doll won't move![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0004
rows.name:
Heh heh!
You said I could do whatever I wanted if I won the duel.
Keep your promise like a proper Larsian, Old Man![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0005
rows.name:
...[ST:playername ], thanks!
Because of you, I was able to make the dream
I've held onto for so long a reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_JNK0010
rows.name: Congratulate

rows.label: qev050404_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell the rejoicing De Ezich that you are happy for him.

rows.label: qev050404_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050404_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask him about making you fight the duel in his place.

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0006
rows.name:
You really are a good person.
You see, when I told my parents I wanted to leave the Larsian hideout
and live on my own in NLA,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0007
rows.name:
Ah... Did I not tell you?
You see, when I told my parents I wanted to leave the Larsian hideout
and live on my own in NLA,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0008
rows.name:
Both my old man and my mom became furious,
yelling things like, "Are you abandoning your loyalty to Ga Derg-sama?!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0009
rows.name:
After a massive argument, the old man told me
I could go if I beat him in a duel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0010
rows.name:
Man, you really saved me!
Thanks to your fierce fighting, I am officially
a free man...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ezich!!
You... shameless boy!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0012
rows.name:
Your behavior...
The disrespect you've shown toward Sazon-sama, the head of this house...
I have witnessed it all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0013
rows.name: Gehk... Mom...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0014
rows.name:
Because you are the child I bore with my own body,
I endured your shallow behavior, which is so unbecoming of a Larsian...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0015
rows.name:
But I can endure no more!
As the one responsible for bringing you into this world...
I will cut you down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0016
rows.name:
Oh crap...
When my mom gets mad, she loses all sense of reason.
She's way more dangerous than the old man...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0017
rows.name:
At this rate, I'm really going to be killed.
Right? You can do it!
Please, stop my mom![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050404_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell De Ezich to step back and leave it to you.

rows.label: qev050404_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050404_SEL0041
rows.name:
Try to wash your hands of the situation,
stating you have no intention of interfering in a family quarrel.

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0018
rows.name:
A-Alright!
I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Wha?!
Please, don't say something so cold?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0020
rows.name:
Look! My mom is already charging at me!
Please, think of it as saving my life and fight her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0021
rows.name:
...What is the meaning of this? Are you intending
to side with this fool?
Then I shall cut you down along with my son![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050404_MSG0022
rows.name:
Rest assured...
Once this is over, I will follow after you!
Here I come!![ST:wait ]
